notes: HYGIENE REPORT section assertion passes 5/6 runs — eval-2 baseline mimicked the format after seeing /hygiene prompt; weakest discriminator
CLAUDE.md line count check and Session closed: line are strongest discriminators — 3/3 with_skill, 0/3 without_skill for both
Skill validity check (Check 9) and injection scan (Check 3) never appear in baseline runs — reliably skill-only behaviors
with_skill runs average 94s longer but use 5800 fewer tokens — skill guides efficient Grep/Glob use over broad Bash exploration
Bash denied to all subagents: test suite and pip-audit fell back to assumed baseline in all runs — not a skill discriminator
Skill gap: Check 1 covers only *.py files — real .env key found only by baseline agents; skill should also scan .env for live key patterns
